_note: vol-02 교차검증(Spark+Gemini) Opus Tier-3 확정 수정. id=글로벌 문장순번. 시적의도·정상표현 기각, 오역·문법·지시대상·번역체만 채택.

fixes.new: Huh? The Byeokgolje Farming Culture Museum…
Ha…ra… you woke me…
Let the three of us stop the darkness from locking the light away.
The light of the road is fading. Let's calm our hearts along with it.
Yes, Hara. The youngest child of Volume One has, over time, become the new king.
Now it is time for us to divide and govern the universe.
I will take the constellations. I will be a guide for those who lose their way.
Only five became well known, and the other six were shrouded in mystery.
Pen, kept a secret… why is that?
I guess even myths get forgotten if no one can remember the names.
My mother is right.
Oh no, Pen. It looks like he's going to break his promise.
A mother's words are never spoken in vain.
You too will meet the same fate at the hands of your own child!
Just as you pushed your father aside, you too will yield your throne to your own child.
I will stop it.
Brother, by those words… who do you mean to start a family with?
Where could Rhea be. By Mother's side, surely.
Lead the new age together by my side.
I'll choose to trust love over fear.
Rhea, I hope you'll be happy…
How does the power of the one who locked them away reach all the way here…
That night, Cronus was haunted by a terrible dream.
A dream… was it a dream?
No… is that really going to happen to me too?
The moment a child is born, I shall put them into a deep sleep at once.
I will let no one take this throne from me.
A dark promise, unknown to the loving mother.
It's a promise I can never tell you about.
A myth records its own path.
Is there no way to stop it, Pen?
The one who forgot his promise put the child into a deep sleep and locked her away.
Rhea, don't cry — rest here in my arms.
How a mother's heart must ache….
Not again…? How could he do this?
You at least… I want to keep you by my side.
I will take that child away as well.
Tragedy repeats itself in the very same way.
This child is the same as the rest.
Husband, my heart feels completely empty.
Mother, how am I supposed to go on living?
I would rather just disappear.
Rhea, stand up.
Rhea, listen closely.
This next child alone, let us hide somewhere else.
Without Cronus knowing — on a far, secluded island.
He can be saved. It's in a mother's hands.
At least my last baby will grow up in my own arms.
And the day a mother chose to stand against fate.
They're newborn babies… how could such a thing happen?
On our next journey, let's go and see that day.
Yeah… I really want to go and see it.
Yes, Mother. I won't let this child be taken from my arms.
The real myth begins now. Watch closely.
Husband, I'm sorry. Just this once, I'm going with a mother's heart.
The sea will enfold you. Do not be afraid.
Husband, this stone is the last lie I will ever tell you.
This is a mother's clever plan. It's the moment love becomes the greatest courage.
Husband… here is this child. Please take him.
Why do your eyes shine so? You ought to be grieving.
I think she'll get caught… my heart is pounding hard.
Please hold on just a little longer…
A mother's acting is a mask that love itself created.
Another one… I've put to sleep with my own hands.
Not even the magic of the golden sickle could pierce a mother's love.
Mother, we'll lull him to sleep with songs and raise him on honey.
A mother's clever plan is the kindest lie myth ever left behind.
When the newborn Zeus grows up, what kind of man will he become?
